basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Deoghar Non Faculty Posts Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Biomedical Engineer, Assistant Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Deoghar
basic_details.job_location: AIIMS Deoghar, Devipur Campus, Deoghar, Jharkhand
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Deoghar has released an advertisement for contractual engagement of various Non-Faculty posts for a period of 11 months, extendable yearly based on performance or till regular appointments are made.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 45 days from publication in Employment News

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid only through Demand Draft and once remitted will not be refunded.

age_limit.age_details: 11 months, extendable or till regular appointment
age_limit.details: All the advertised posts are for the Unreserved (UR) category and one post is available for each of the positions listed below.

qualification.details: Age limit as mentioned against each post in the vacancy table. Age is relaxable for Government servants, SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Government of India rules. Experience wherever prescribed will be counted after obtaining the essential qualification. | A recognized medical qualification included in I or II schedule or Part II of the 3rd schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, fulfilling the conditions of section 13(3). 5 years’ experience in Blood Bank with component separator, OR MD in Blood Transfusion Medicine with 1 year experience in Blood Bank with component separator during PG course. | BE / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc with Diploma in Computer Application. 10 years’ experience in IT Systems, Networking, Hardware Configuration, Software Programming in Ministries/Departments of Government of India, State Governments, Union Territories, Statutory/Autonomous Bodies. | Degree from a recognized University/Institution with a Post-Graduate Diploma in Public Relations/Corporate Communication/Journalism/Mass Communication. 10 years’ experience in Public Relations/Corporate Communication/Journalism/Mass Communication. | Recognized medical qualification included in I or II schedule or Part II of the 3rd schedule to the IMC Act, 1956 (other than licentiate qualifications), fulfilling section 13(3) conditions. 2 years’ experience in Blood Bank work after registration as a Medical graduate. Must be registered with a State Medical Council. | Degree in Law or equivalent. Should be a qualified legal practitioner with at least 6 years’ experience. | Degree from a recognized University or equivalent. Officers from Police Departments of Central/State/UT Governments or Armed Forces/Para-Military Forces holding analogous posts or with 2-3 years regular service in PB-2 GP 4800/4600 or above, preferably with experience in security and handling agitations/strikes. | Graduate in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institute. 5 years’ experience in design and engineering of projects, preferably in a hospital environment. | Pass in Class 12. Health Sanitary Inspector course of 1 year duration from a recognized University/Institution. 10 years’ experience in sanitation, preferably in a 200-bedded hospital. | BE/B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering from a recognized Institution/University OR Diploma in Biomedical Engineering with 2 years’ relevant experience. | 12th pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/School. Diploma/Certificate in Dry Cleaning/Laundry Technology from a recognized Institute. 12 years’ experience in a reputed mechanized Laundry. | B.Sc. degree from a recognized University. Certificate in Perfusion Technology awarded by a recognized Institution/Association such as Association of Thoracic and Cardio Vascular Surgeons of India after training in a centre with at least 1 year experience in Clinical Perfusion. Desirable: Working experience in Clinical Perfusion.

salary_details.details: The above-mentioned contractual posts at AIIMS Deoghar will carry a consolidated monthly salary as given below and no other allowances will be paid.

selection_process: The engagement shall be purely on contract basis for a period of 11 months or till regular appointments against the same posts are made
and does not confer any right for regularization.

Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications and interview/walk-in-interview as decided by AIIMS Deoghar. No TA/DA will be paid for attending document verification or interview. The appointee will be on whole-time appointment and shall not accept any other assignment or engage in private practice during the contract period. The contract can be terminated at any time by either side by giving one month’s notice or paying one month’s salary without assigning any reason. The appointee will not be entitled to benefits like Provident Fund
Promotion etc. available to regular Government servants.
how_to_apply: The application process for AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty contractual posts is completely offline.
Visit the official website of AIIMS Deoghar and download the prescribed application form from the recruitment section.
Fill the application form carefully in all respects and affix a recent passport size colour photograph in the given space.

Attach self-attested photocopies of date of birth certificate, degree certificates, experience certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), No Objection Certificate (if working in Govt/Autonomous body) etc. in the order mentioned in the advertisement.
Draw a Demand Draft of the applicable application fee in favour of “AIIMS Deoghar” payable at Deoghar and attach the original DD with the application.

Send the complete application form along with all enclosures and Demand Draft by post to the following address: Recruitment Cell, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Deoghar, At - Devipur Campus, Ramsagar, Deoghar - 814117, Jharkhand.
Ensure that the application reaches the above address within 45 days from the publication of the advertisement in Employment News.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the schedule of document verification and interview via email. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview/document verification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty Salary 2026
content_sections.text: The above-mentioned contractual posts at AIIMS Deoghar will carry a consolidated monthly salary as given below and no other allowances will be paid.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Age limit as mentioned against each post in the vacancy table. Age is relaxable for Government servants, SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Government of India rules. Experience wherever prescribed will be counted after obtaining the essential qualification. A recognized medical qualification included in I or II schedule or Part II of the 3rd schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, fulfilling the conditions of section 13(3). 5 years’ experience in Blood Bank with component separator, OR MD in Blood Transfusion Medicine with 1 year experience in Blood Bank with component separator during PG course. BE / B.Tech / MCA / B.Sc with Diploma in Computer Application. 10 years’ experience in IT Systems, Networking, Hardware Configuration, Software Programming in Ministries/Departments of Government of India, State Governments, Union Territories, Statutory/Autonomous Bodies. Degree from a recognized University/Institution with a Post-Graduate Diploma in Public Relations/Corporate Communication/Journalism/Mass Communication. 10 years’ experience in Public Relations/Corporate Communication/Journalism/Mass Communication. Recognized medical qualification included in I or II schedule or Part II of the 3rd schedule to the IMC Act, 1956 (other than licentiate qualifications), fulfilling section 13(3) conditions. 2 years’ experience in Blood Bank work after registration as a Medical graduate. Must be registered with a State Medical Council. Degree in Law or equivalent. Should be a qualified legal practitioner with at least 6 years’ experience. Degree from a recognized University or equivalent. Officers from Police Departments of Central/State/UT Governments or Armed Forces/Para-Military Forces holding analogous posts or with 2-3 years regular service in PB-2 GP 4800/4600 or above, preferably with experience in security and handling agitations/strikes. Graduate in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institute. 5 years’ experience in design and engineering of projects, preferably in a hospital environment. Pass in Class 12. Health Sanitary Inspector course of 1 year duration from a recognized University/Institution. 10 years’ experience in sanitation, preferably in a 200-bedded hospital. BE/B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering from a recognized Institution/University OR Diploma in Biomedical Engineering with 2 years’ relevant experience. 12th pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/School. Diploma/Certificate in Dry Cleaning/Laundry Technology from a recognized Institute. 12 years’ experience in a reputed mechanized Laundry. B.Sc. degree from a recognized University. Certificate in Perfusion Technology awarded by a recognized Institution/Association such as Association of Thoracic and Cardio Vascular Surgeons of India after training in a centre with at least 1 year experience in Clinical Perfusion. Desirable: Working experience in Clinical Perfusion.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty Application Process 2026
content_sections.text: The application process for AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty contractual posts is completely offline. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the schedule of document verification and interview via email. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview/document verification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid only through Demand Draft and once remitted will not be refunded.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process and Terms of Engagement
content_sections.text: The engagement shall be purely on contract basis for a period of 11 months or till regular appointments against the same posts are made, whichever is earlier, and does not confer any right for regularization. Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications and interview/walk-in-interview as decided by AIIMS Deoghar. No TA/DA will be paid for attending document verification or interview. The appointee will be on whole-time appointment and shall not accept any other assignment or engage in private practice during the contract period. The contract can be terminated at any time by either side by giving one month’s notice or paying one month’s salary without assigning any reason. The appointee will not be entitled to benefits like Provident Fund, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Attendance, Seniority, Promotion etc. available to regular Government servants.

faq.question: Q1. For how long will the AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty posts be filled on contract?
faq.answer: These posts are purely on contract for 11 months or until regular appointments against the same posts are made, whichever is earlier.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty contractual posts?
faq.answer: The application has to be submitted in offline mode only through the prescribed application form and sent by post to AIIMS Deoghar.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for SC/ST/PwD/Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC, ST, PwD and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹3000 for General category and ₹1000 for OBC category candidates, payable via Demand Draft in favour of AIIMS Deoghar.

faq.question: Q5. Will contractual appointees be eligible for Government benefits like PF or pension?
faq.answer: No, contractual appointees will not be entitled to benefits like Provident Fund, Pension, Gratuity, Seniority or Promotion available to regular Government servants.
